'''wotavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iceberglike|iceberglike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-t-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iceberglike|iceberglike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wotavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wotavithi|wotavithi]] || [[word:wotaviji|wotaviji]] || [[word:wotavishi|wotavishi]] || [[word:wotaviki|wotaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wotavuthuthu|wotavuthuthu]] || [[word:wotavujuju|wotavujuju]] || [[word:wotavushushu|wotavushushu]] || [[word:wotavukuku|wotavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wotavuthu|wotavuthu]] || [[word:wotavuju|wotavuju]] || [[word:wotavushu|wotavushu]] || [[word:wotavuku|wotavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wotavufthuf|wotavufthuf]] || [[word:wotavufjuf|wotavufjuf]] || [[word:wotavufshuf|wotavufshuf]] || [[word:wotavufkuf|wotavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wotavethe|wotavethe]] || [[word:wotaveje|wotaveje]] || [[word:wotaveshe|wotaveshe]] || [[word:wotaveke|wotaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wotavothotho|wotavothotho]] || [[word:wotavojojo|wotavojojo]] || [[word:wotavoshosho|wotavoshosho]] || [[word:wotavokoko|wotavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wotavotho|wotavotho]] || [[word:wotavojo|wotavojo]] || [[word:wotavosho|wotavosho]] || [[word:wotavoko|wotavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wotavofthof|wotavofthof]] || [[word:wotavofjof|wotavofjof]] || [[word:wotavofshof|wotavofshof]] || [[word:wotavofkof|wotavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfthĂŻf|wotavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfjĂŻf|wotavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfshĂŻf|wotavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfkĂŻf|wotavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|wotavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|wotavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|wotavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|wotavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfthĂŻf|wotavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfjĂŻf|wotavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfshĂŻf|wotavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfkĂŻf|wotavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfthĂŻf|wotavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfjĂŻf|wotavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfshĂŻf|wotavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wotavĂŻfkĂŻf|wotavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wotavĂŠthĂŠ|wotavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:wotavĂŠjĂŠ|wotavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:wotavĂŠshĂŠ|wotavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:wotavĂŠkĂŠ|wotavĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wotavathatha|wotavathatha]] || [[word:wotavajaja|wotavajaja]] || [[word:wotavashasha|wotavashasha]] || [[word:wotavakaka|wotavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wotavatha|wotavatha]] || [[word:wotavaja|wotavaja]] || [[word:wotavasha|wotavasha]] || [[word:wotavaka|wotavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wotavafthaf|wotavafthaf]] || [[word:wotavafjaf|wotavafjaf]] || [[word:wotavafshaf|wotavafshaf]] || [[word:wotavafkaf|wotavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wotavasha|wotavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wotavshĂ«sha|wotavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wotavrosha|wotavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wotavmusha|wotavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wotavyasha|wotavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowotavnkshĂ«sha|gowotavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowotavnkrosha|gowotavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowotavnkmusha|gowotavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowotavnkyasha|gowotavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wotatavasha|wotatavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wotatavshĂ«sha|wotatavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wotatavrosha|wotatavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wotatavmusha|wotatavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wotatavyasha|wotatavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowotatavnkshĂ«sha|gowotatavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowotatavnkrosha|gowotatavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowotatavnkmusha|gowotatavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowotatavnkyasha|gowotatavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wetĂŠvasha|wetĂŠvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wetĂŠvshĂ«sha|wetĂŠvshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wetĂŠvrosha|wetĂŠvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wetĂŠvmusha|wetĂŠvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wetĂŠvyasha|wetĂŠvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowetĂŠvnkshĂ«sha|gowetĂŠvnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowetĂŠvnkrosha|gowetĂŠvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowetĂŠvnkmusha|gowetĂŠvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowetĂŠvnkyasha|gowetĂŠvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wotfavasha|wotfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wotfavshĂ«sha|wotfavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wotfavrosha|wotfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wotfavmusha|wotfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wotfavyasha|wotfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowotfavnkshĂ«sha|gowotfavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowotfavnkrosha|gowotfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowotfavnkmusha|gowotfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowotfavnkyasha|gowotfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
